# Dolphin — pre-tune diff (maiden prep), 2026-07-11
# Generated by tools/pretune.py, then curated. Diffed against
# INAV_9.0.1_cli_DOLPHINPRO_20260423_000000.txt.
#
# Dolphin already carries a hand-tune (ff_pitch 110, ff_roll 65, rates 18/9)
# that the physics model independently landed next to (122 / 48, 19 / 10) —
# good validation. Since it's close and deliberate, KEEP the existing PIDs
# and change only the missing GPS-nav params + launch fixes.
#
# Command:  tools/pretune.py dolphin --diff --pid none --bank 35
#
# What changes and why:
#   - cruise/reference airspeed 16.1 m/s: were unset — RTH/loiter had no speed
#     target and could fly too slow toward stall.
#   - loiter 37.6 m at 35° bank: wide, gentle orbit for a fast wing.
#   - launch_max_angle 75 -> 45: 75° was very permissive (own dump flagged it);
#     45° is a saner hand-launch detection window.
#   - launch_climb 25 -> 35, launch_thr 1700: brisk, steep chuck-launch.
#
# CAVEATS:
#   - CG ~18% MAC is an ESTIMATE. AtomRC marks CG physically on the wing —
#     balance there, fly, then move 3-4 mm forward for crisper control.
#     Deltas are pitch-twitchy; keep a touch of reflex.
#   - cruise_throttle 1362 (~36%) assumes T/W≈1.4 + 0.6 thrust derate; verify.

set nav_fw_cruise_speed = 1607
set fw_reference_airspeed = 1607
set nav_fw_bank_angle = 35
set nav_fw_loiter_radius = 3758
set nav_fw_cruise_throttle = 1362
set nav_fw_min_throttle = 1150
set nav_fw_max_throttle = 1850
set nav_fw_launch_climb_angle = 35
set nav_fw_launch_max_angle = 45
set nav_fw_launch_thr = 1700

# PIDs unchanged (keeping the hand-tune). CG target ~18% MAC — set physically.
save
